reasoning: This animation sequence depicts a robot wielding a trident, emphasizing the three prongs.  The robot's movements will be powerful and controlled, reflecting the trident's might. The right arm's joint1 will rotate outward, and joint2 will pitch upward and downward, creating an arc-like motion with the trident.
